item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Creationism is epistemic abuse, not science
item.description: Carl Sagan addresses why creationism is not taught alongside empirical sciences. Creationism is a subset of science denialism eschewing demonstrable facts for mythological doctrine. Prescribing that science is incompatible with religion creates a fallacious false dilemma that creates an illusion of choosing to endorse ones religion or science. To AI concerns: I'm a human ideator and not a bit or reposter AI agent. I am currently looking into and checking the validity of this clip. It seems to trace back to a National Press Club Q&A session in 1986, link for longer clips below. If anyone finds more evidence confirming it's authenticity, comment it and I'll update or remove accordingly. https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=LCtCY-ALIqY
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: No One Wanted to Come!
item.description: https://www.forbes.com/sites/antoniopequenoiv/2026/05/30/trump-replacing-great-american-state-fair-with-rally-after-performers-drop-out/ As seen all over the news and imgur, artists and attendies kept canceling on Trump's big birthday and national anniversary event. So now he's turned it into another Rally. This "celebration" was supposed to last from June 25th through July 10th I hope the seats stay empty, like his parade last year!

item.title: The mitochondria is the power house of the cell
item.description:
I like those videos where it says mom is screaming getoffthecounter but my name is Sprinkles
And there has to be bubble tea
I’m having trouble remembering the original content
It’s actually the dryer that does this to me
Ignorance is bliss
Never take from the top
As someone to refuses to count, I would never
As it should be
To write or not to write
Cat tax

26 Man Tax: Tye Sheridan
"The unseen design of things is more harmonious than the seen." - Heraclitus So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.**
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: I want him to do a turkey for Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: Fanner50

item.title: Twilight zone
item.description: I know a lot of people will say “they were always like that and just hiding it” but I refuse to believe that, and perhaps that’s just me being naive or not wanting to accept the reality that the people I loved who raised me were always bad people. I am living proof my family were not always like this. I am a kind caring compassionate person, I’m not a racist, I’m very open minded and I’ve always treated people the way I’d like to be treated and never based on their appearance or the color of their skin or their gender identity or sexuality. I was raised to be this way. I grew up in an all white conservative family, and while there were some questionable opinions and stances, the people who raised me weren’t all bad. If they were, they would have raised me to be just as intolerant and racist and hateful as they were and instead of posting this here, I’d be typing a totally different post on truth social right now. Decades of propaganda, fear mongering, divisive rhetoric, and outright lies took all of their insecurities, all of their ignorance, all of their absolute worst selves and brought it all to the surface and amplified it exponentially. Of course plenty were always as awful as they are today, but many were not, many were decent people, nowhere near perfect of course, but decent people that I KNOW would have been shocked if you went back in time and showed them what’s happening today to them back in the 80s or 90s. Yes there was tons of racism and bigotry back then as well, but I also think the average maga voter would not have approved of what’s happening today decades ago. This was done to our families, this was something they did, and this does not absolve our loved ones of responsibility, I’m not defending them or saying they should just be forgiven, they will have to accept responsibility and atone for this if they want to be forgiven, if that’s even on the table at all. But I will never EVER forgive what was done to my family. They were decent people who I cared for and loved deeply and they were ripped away from me over the last 30 years or so.
item.dc:creator: capnadorable

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1704 (LOTR Sunday)
item.description:
Let's get this bread
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "What are you doing? Glory Pippin." ____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: An ounce of prevention is worth a pound of punishment
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: GovBrief Today #485
item.description: Anabella Gyasi told the truth about why she was afraid, and it cost her a week in a locked room at Dulles. The pregnant teacher came to the US on a valid visa to get her disabled son to a doctor. She said her own mother had told her to kill the boy. The government called that an asylum claim, voided her visa, and held them in a windowless room. Hospitalized twice and unable to feed her son, she signed her own deportation order to make it stop. Anabella followed the rules that were more than forty years old. Donald Trump overrode them on day one of his second administration. Use 5 Calls or Resistbot to tell your representatives to write that protection back into law. I've emailed 7,623 stories over 485 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist LINKS Email link: gbounacos.substack.com Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260530-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may30 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/georgia-judge [3] https://go.govbrief.today/comey-prosecutor [4] https://go.govbrief.today/tariff-refund-appeal [5] https://go.govbrief.today/ghana-mom [6] https://go.govbrief.today/chicago-pope [7] https://go.govbrief.today/250-concert [8] https://go.govbrief.today/kushner-dodge [9] https://go.govbrief.today/camp-montana-suit Epstein Timeline: https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-crimes Email link: gbounacos.substack.com ***** IMPORTANT IMGUR NOTE ***** For more than a year, I've been unable to respond to private messages. I can see THEM, but the company confirmed I have been punished for some transgression they refuse to name. To respond to yesterday's, yes, I do use Ground News. It's good, but it isn't able to include a lot. I highly commend the States Newsroom family of nonprofit newsrooms. Just enter your state's name and States Newsroom into Google. Finally, I use plain Google because I want to provide local coverage where possible. I have a good idea of the best newsrooms in major metros, but Google helps me find the one in Nebraska or rural Kansas. I appreciate you asking and hope that shed a little light on the process. One last thing I try very hard to do is limit each source to one story a day. So AP gets one, UPI gets one, I try to use foreign sources for US aggression against others, then the states and metros. Most companies don't provide gift links, but I use the 10 I get each month from the Washington Post, New York Times, and Wall Street Journal. When I can't, I try to find their syndication partners who've run the same story.
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: “Mother, Was I Good?”
item.description: “Yes, Baby. Now eat a cookie and let’s go to bed.” “I have a bed?” “Yup, and your new people sleep there, too.” “But I’ve…” “Tomorrow, Bobbie, we can start answering all the questions you have. Tomorrow.“ Thank you to all of you following our adventures today. KittensForDays might actually be an angel of mercy and kindness. Don’t tell her I told you; I don’t want to blow her cover.

item.description: Catherine Rampell: "I'm pretty sure that the Ghost of Spirit Airlines would love a word in all of this."

item.title: This is the energy I'm bringing to gay pride this year.
item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: Power to the People Fest!
item.description: Power To The People is a celebration of peace, love, justice, music and community action. Curated by Tom Morello, this one-day event at Merriweather Post Pavilion in Columbia, MD is about the power everyday human beings have when they come together — through music, art, community and action — to shape our country and our planet on, and beyond, Election Day. The more we show up, in solidarity, with LOVE being the focus. Love for our fellow humans, love for our planet, love for ourselves...the more we will have the strength to fight hate.
item.dc:creator: Autittuderp
